reasonSummary: In 2013, a Russian court in Novorossiysk banned a translation of the Quran by Elmir Kuliyev under the country's 'extremism' laws. The ban was soon overturned.
note: In 2013, a Russian court in Novorossiysk banned a translation of the Quran by Elmir Kuliyev under the country's 'extremism' laws. The ban was soon overturned.
